title: IISER Kolkata Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 27 Posts
organization: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Kolkata
short_info: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Kolkata (IISER Kolkata) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website of IISER Kolkata. A total of 27 vacancies have been announced through the IISER Kolkata Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent CGPA, Publications in Q1 journals as first author, Teaching/research/industry experience for Grade-I
qualification.details: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent CGPA. 60% marks or equivalent CGPA at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with excellent academic record. Minimum 4 publications as first author in Q1 journals (3 for CDS) for Gr.II or Minimum 6 publications as first author in Q1 journals (4 for DMS and CDS) for Gr.I. At least 3 years teaching/research/industry experience (excluding PhD) for Gr.I.

salary_details.details: Academic Pay Level 10 (₹70,900) for Gr.II Academic Pay Level 12 (₹1,01,500) for Gr.I

selection_process: Screening by Department Departmental Faculty Advisory Committee (DFAC) shortlisting Presentation and interaction Institute Faculty Advisory Committee (IFAC) review Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IISER Kolkata Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Kolkata to complete the application.
